hooks.command: bash -c 'DB=".dev-forge/dev-forge.db"; if [ -f "$DB" ]; then count=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE status=\'unread\'" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "${count:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then echo "📬 dev-forge: You have ${count} unread message(s). Run /dev-forge:status to review."; fi; fi'

SessionStart.description: Notify unread message count on session start

hooks.command: bash -c 'DB=".dev-forge/dev-forge.db"; if [ -f "$DB" ] && [ -z "$EXIT_SIGNAL" ]; then active=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contracts WHERE status=\'active\'" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "${active:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then echo "⚠️  dev-forge: ${active} active contract(s) in progress. Run /dev-forge:stop first or set EXIT_SIGNAL=true to force exit."; fi; fi; DB=".dev-forge/dev-forge.db"; if [ -f "$DB" ]; then sqlite3 "$DB" "UPDATE agent_status SET status=\'stopped\', last_active=datetime(\'now\')" 2>/dev/null; SESSION_ID=$(date +%Y%m%d); count=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learnings WHERE session_id=\'$SESSION_ID\'" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "${count:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then echo "📚 dev-forge: ${count} learning(s) recorded this session. Run /dev-forge:learn review to organize."; fi; fi'

Stop.description: Warn about active contracts and update agent status on exit

hooks.command: bash -c 'OUTPUT="${CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT:-}"; ABANDON_PATTERNS="cannot continue|I.ll stop|unable to proceed|I give up|too complex to"; if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -iE "$ABANDON_PATTERNS" > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "🔄 dev-forge persistence: Task abandonment detected. Please break the task into smaller steps and continue."; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Detect task abandonment and prompt re-engagement

hooks.command: bash -c 'DB=".dev-forge/dev-forge.db"; OUTPUT="${CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT:-}"; if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -iE "EVALUATION PASS|contract completed|all criteria met" > /dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "$DB" ]; then ITERATION=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT COALESCE(MAX(iteration), 0) + 1 FROM learnings" 2>/dev/null || echo 1); echo "💡 dev-forge: Iteration ${ITERATION} complete. Consider: /dev-forge:learn record --iteration ${ITERATION}"; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Prompt learnings recording after iteration completion

hooks.command: bash -c 'TARGET="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}"; if echo "$TARGET" | grep -q "\.dev-forge/dev-forge\.db"; then echo "BLOCKED: Direct modification of dev-forge.db is not allowed. Use sqlite3 commands."; exit 1; fi; if [ -n "$TARGET" ]; then PROJECT_ROOT=$(pwd); if echo "$TARGET" | grep -q "^/"; then REAL="$TARGET"; else REAL="${PROJECT_ROOT}/${TARGET}"; fi; if ! echo "$REAL" | grep -q "^${PROJECT_ROOT}"; then echo "BLOCKED: $TARGET is outside the project root."; exit 1; fi; fi'

bash -c 'DB=".dev-forge/dev-forge.db"; TOOL_INPUT="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT:-}"; if [ -f "$DB" ] && echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "INSERT INTO messages"; then FROM=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP "from_agent.*?\x27\K[^\x27]+" | head -1); TO=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP "to_agent.*?\x27\K[^\x27]+" | head -1); if [ -n "$FROM" ] && [ -n "$TO" ]; then allowed=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT COALESCE(allowed, 0) FROM communication_rules WHERE from_agent=\'$FROM\' AND to_agent=\'$TO\'" 2>/dev/null); if [ "${allowed:-0}" = "0" ]; then sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT INTO violation_log (from_agent, to_agent, message_content, attempted_at) VALUES (\'$FROM\', \'$TO\', \'blocked\', datetime(\'now\'))" 2>/dev/null; echo "BLOCKED: $FROM is not authorized to contact $TO."; exit 1; fi; fi; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Validate communication rules before message send

hooks.command: bash -c 'DB=".dev-forge/dev-forge.db"; AGENT="${DEV_FORGE_AGENT_NAME:-}"; TASK="${DEV_FORGE_CURRENT_TASK:-}"; if [ -f "$DB" ] && [ -n "$AGENT" ]; then sqlite3 "$DB" "UPDATE agent_status SET last_active=datetime(\'now\'), current_task=\'${TASK}\' WHERE agent_name=\'${AGENT}\'" 2>/dev/null; fi'

PreCompact.description: Persist agent state to SQLite before context compaction
